NVIDIA Cosmos Notices

This repository includes workflow surfaces and documentation for NVIDIA Cosmos
model workflows. The workflows fetch model weights at runtime from Hugging Face
using a user-provided token whose account has accepted the relevant model
license terms.

Attribution:

  Built on NVIDIA Cosmos

Model and source references:

  Cosmos 3 source:
    https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos
    https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos-framework

  Cosmos 3 model cards:
    https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Nano
    https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Super

  Cosmos Transfer 2.5 source and model cards:
    https://github.com/nvidia-cosmos/cosmos-transfer2.5
    https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos-Transfer2.5-2B

License references:

  Cosmos 3 source and model cards currently reference OpenMDW-1.1. A copy is
  vendored in OPENMDW-1.1.txt.

  Cosmos Transfer 2.5 source code is Apache-2.0 and the model materials are
  released under the NVIDIA Open Model License. A copy is vendored in
  NVIDIA_OPEN_MODEL_LICENSE.txt.

Safety policy:

  Cosmos guardrails are kept on by default in NPA customer-facing CLI, SDK, and
  SkyPilot workflow surfaces. No customer-facing flag or environment variable is
  provided to disable them.
